title: Zelda 2 Great Palace Theme on Mario Paint Composer
description:
I'm in a very Zelda-ish mood this weekend. The song is fairly simple, unlike the very difficult dungeon it represents about an hour and a half on this one. Please enjoy!

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: FreezScreen Video Capture - (not recommended)

All free, legal, and unlimited.
